title: get current patient queue without authentication
description: Verify that the GET /api/pasien/antrian endpoint returns a 200 status with the current live queue data without requiring authentication.

title: get doctor examination queue with valid token
description: Verify that the GET /api/dokter/pemeriksaan endpoint returns a 200 status with the list of queues for examination when accessed with a valid authentication token.

title: get doctor examination queue without token
description: Verify that the GET /api/dokter/pemeriksaan endpoint returns a 401 Unauthorized status when accessed without an authentication token.

title: get admin schedule list with valid token
description: Verify that the GET /api/admin/jadwal endpoint returns a 200 status with the list of schedules when accessed with a valid admin authentication token.

title: get admin schedule list without token
description: Verify that the GET /api/admin/jadwal endpoint returns a 401 Unauthorized status when accessed without an authentication token.
